summary: UI improvements verification completed for Forms, Quotations, and Contracts screens. All requested features are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell.js (lines 63-78): markAllAsRead() correctly implements setNotifications([]) and setUnreadCount(0) to clear notifications after API call
NotificationBell.js (line 137): Button only shows when unreadCount > 0 - correct conditional rendering
AdminDashboard.js: Forms/Quotations/Contracts screens all have proper Quick Stats headers with 4 cards each
All screens properly support RTL layout with flex-row-reverse classes
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI improvements verified in iteration 11. All screens working correctly with Quick Stats headers and improved list layouts.

mark_all_as_read.behavior: Button only appears when unreadCount > 0. After clicking, setNotifications([]) clears notifications from dropdown, setUnreadCount(0) hides the button.
mark_all_as_read.api_verification: Confirmed notifications API returns is_read: true and unread_count: 0 after marking all as read

quotations_screen_quick_stats.ui_elements: Prominent pricing display on each card, status badges, standards badges

stats_cards: Most Recent Contract (Stamp Test Company LLC)
